title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: BURNS PAIUTE TRIBE TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and information for services and programs for the Burns Paiute Tribe. 100 Pasigo Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 573-2088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (541) 573-2088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD DISTRIBUTION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BURNS PAIUTE TRIBE
